lyrics.text: Did you wash your hands with soap? Did you dry them?
What is this? All vegetables. You wanted all vegetables? I did. They're good.
Are we going to talk about it? What? The elephant in the room.
What elephant? I guess not.
Then you're referring to today. Yeah. What's the deal with today?
We all made mistakes. For example, you kids were supposed to watch Jack-Jack.
Well, you guys did the important stuff.
We talked about this. You're not old enough to decide about these things.
We are old enough to help out. Isn't that what you tell us, Dad?
Well, help out can mean many different things.
We're supposed to help if there's trouble. Yeah. Aren't you glad we helped today?
I know, but you said that you were proud of us. Well, yeah, I was. Am.
We want to fight bad guys.
No, you don't. You said things were different now, and they were on the island,
but I didn't mean that from now on. So now we've got to go back to never using our powers.
It defines who I am. We're not saying— What? Someone on TV said it.
Can we just eat the dinner while it's hot?
Did we do something wrong? No, we didn't do anything wrong.
Superheroes are illegal. Whether it's fair or not, that's the law.
The law should be fair.
What are we teaching our kids? To respect the law.
Even when the law is disrespectful.
If laws are unjust, there are laws to change them.
Otherwise, it's chaos, which is exactly what we have.
I just thought it was kind of cool.
What? Fighting crime as a family.
It was cool. But it's over. The world is what it is. We have to adapt.
Are things bad? Things are fine.
May I be excused?
How much longer in the motel, Dad?
Not much longer, honey.
